name: goalos-workspace
description: GoalOS — Structured intent graphs for AI agent alignment

scripts.hf:space:verify: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { join } = require('node:path'); const cwd = process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd(); const target = join(cwd, 'scripts', 'verify-hf-space.mjs'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [target], { stdio: 'inherit', cwd }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.hf:space:publish: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { join } = require('node:path'); const cwd = process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd(); const target = join(cwd, 'scripts', 'publish-hf-space.mjs'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [target], { stdio: 'inherit', cwd }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
